title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Apollo Telehealth - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Apollo Telehealth - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Telehealth invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Apollo Telehealth:
Apollo Telehealth is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth!
